tags.description: Mount Tatlow adopted 26 June 1911 on Ottawa file OBF 0024, as submitted 23 June 1910 by Sidney Williams, BCLS, Vancouver. Name changed 11 March 2019 to Tŝ'ilʔoŝ as recommended by Tŝilhqot’in National Government as Tŝ'ilʔoŝ is the Tŝilhqot’in name.
tags.name: Tŝ'ilʔoŝ
